description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named libopenshot CI Build that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to build on ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04 with both gcc and clang compilers. For each job, check out the repository, install dependencies, build libopenshot with optional coverage if using clang, run tests, install libopenshot, and upload coverage to Codecov if using clang.
